seoTitle: Namatjira vs Nauiyu — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Namatjira and Nauiyu. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Namatjira and Nauiyu.
heading: Namatjira vs Nauiyu — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Namatjira, Northern Territory and Nauiyu, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Namatjira has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Nauiyu (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Namatjira or Nauiyu safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Namatjira has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Nauiyu scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Namatjira scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Nauiyu scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Namatjira or Nauiyu?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Namatjira has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.53% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
